// reporters: Tier2ReporterDecl.java.txt#InternalLog.logInternal
package com.other;

import com.consumer.x.InternalLog;

// Case (ii): the qualifier's package comes from the explicit import
// (com.consumer.x), so it matches the declaration even from another package.
class Tier2ExplicitImport {
    void importedIsCapture() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            InternalLog.logInternal("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
